raw.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: BDGS is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alpha Architect 1-3 Month Box ETF stock at 56.55%, United States Treasury Notes 1.5% at 15.31%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 9.94%, Microsoft at 3.81%, and Meta Platforms at 2.85%.

overview.description: The Bridges Capital Tactical ETF (BDGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that allocates between passively managed US total market ETFs, large-cap US stocks, and cash or cash equivalents through a tactical strategy based on macroeconomic events, changing market breadth, and volatility. BDGS was launched on May 11, 2023 and is issued by Bridges Capital.
